subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thy loved ones have gathered in this resplendent assembly, seeking Thy all-encompassing grace and the radiance of Thy light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی قد اجتمعوا فی هذا المجمع الحافل احبائک طلبا لفیضک الشامل و تجلی انوار
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God
